creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, 

lang/gcc7 is failing to build for me on recent CURRENT in poudriere for a week or something. Building with MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes fails with the same error. Any thoughts? Here are relevant parts of log (also tried to build todays r482485):


port directory: /usr/ports/lang/gcc7
package name: gcc7-7.3.0_5
building for: FreeBSD prod12-20180930-job-01 12.0-ALPHA9 FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA9 1200085 amd64
maintained by: gerald@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/lang/gcc7/Makefile 479405 2018-09-10 13:11:23Z mat $
Poudriere version: 3.2.7
Host OSVERSION: 1200085
Jail OSVERSION: 1200085

[...]

gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc7/work/.build'
Comparing stages 2 and 3
warning: gcc/cc1obj-checksum.o differs
Bootstrap comparison failure!
gcc/fold-const-call.o differs
gcc/expmed.o differs

[...]

libiberty/rust-demangle.o differs
libiberty/lbasename.o differs
libiberty/choose-temp.o differs
libiberty/spaces.o differs
lto-plugin/.libs/lto-plugin.o differs
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:22225: compare] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc7/work/.build'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:22205: stage3-bubble] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc7/work/.build'
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:22279: bootstrap-lean] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc7/work/.build'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/gcc7
